fields.name: IOLOCK
fields.description: Locking the AF configuration of associated IOs

fields.name: TCRCINI
fields.description: CRC calculation initialization pattern control for transmitter

enum_values.name: AllZeros
enum_values.description: All zeros TX CRC initialization pattern

enum_values.name: AllOnes
enum_values.description: All ones TX CRC initialization pattern

fields.name: RCRCINI
fields.description: CRC calculation initialization pattern control for receiver

enum_values.name: AllZeros
enum_values.description: All zeros RX CRC initialization pattern

enum_values.name: AllOnes
enum_values.description: All ones RX CRC initialization pattern

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: Full size (33/17 bit) CRC polynomial is not used

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Full size (33/17 bit) CRC polynomial is used

enum_values.name: SlaveSelected
enum_values.description: 0 is forced onto the SS signal and the I/O value of the SS pin is ignored

enum_values.name: SlaveNotSelected
enum_values.description: 1 is forced onto the SS signal and the I/O value of the SS pin is ignored

fields.name: MASRX
fields.description: Master automatic SUSP in Receive mode

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: Automatic suspend in master receive-only mode disabled

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Automatic suspend in master receive-only mode enabled

fields.name: TSER
fields.description: Number of data transfer extension to be reload into TSIZE just when a previous

fields.name: TSIZE
fields.description: Number of data at current transfer

fields.name: CRCSIZE
fields.description: Length of CRC frame to be transacted and compared

fields.name: UDRDET
fields.description: Detection of underrun condition at slave transmitter

enum_values.name: StartOfFrame
enum_values.description: Underrun is detected at begin of data frame

enum_values.name: EndOfFrame
enum_values.description: Underrun is detected at end of last data frame

enum_values.name: StartOfSlaveSelect
enum_values.description: Underrun is detected at begin of active SS signal

fields.name: UDRCFG
fields.description: Behavior of slave transmitter at underrun condition

enum_values.name: Constant
enum_values.description: Slave sends a constant underrun pattern

enum_values.name: RepeatReceived
enum_values.description: Slave repeats last received data frame from master

enum_values.name: RepeatTransmitted
enum_values.description: Slave repeats last transmitted data frame

fields.name: DSIZE
fields.description: Number of bits in at single SPI data frame

enum_values.name: NotControlled
enum_values.description: Peripheral takes no control of GPIOs while disabled

fields.name: SSOM
fields.description: SS output management in master mode

enum_values.name: Asserted
enum_values.description: SS is asserted until data transfer complete

enum_values.name: NotAsserted
enum_values.description: Data frames interleaved with SS not asserted during MIDI

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: SS output is disabled in master mode

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: SS output is enabled in master mode

enum_values.name: ActiveLow
enum_values.description: Low level is active for SS signal

enum_values.name: ActiveHigh
enum_values.description: High level is active for SS signal

fields.name: SSM
fields.description: Software management of SS signal input

enum_values.name: FirstEdge
enum_values.description: The first clock transition is the first data capture edge

enum_values.name: SecondEdge
enum_values.description: The second clock transition is the first data capture edge

enum_values.name: MSBFirst
enum_values.description: Data is transmitted/received with the MSB first

enum_values.name: LSBFirst
enum_values.description: Data is transmitted/received with the LSB first

fields.name: IOSWP
fields.description: Swap functionality of MISO and MOSI pins

fields.name: TSERFIE
fields.description: Additional number of transactions reload interrupt enable

fields.name: EOTIE
fields.description: EOT, SUSP and TXC interrupt enable

fields.name: CTSIZE
fields.description: Number of data frames remaining in current TSIZE session

enum_values.name: ZeroFrames
enum_values.description: Zero frames beyond packing ratio available

enum_values.name: OneFrame
enum_values.description: One frame beyond packing ratio available

enum_values.name: TwoFrames
enum_values.description: Two frame beyond packing ratio available

enum_values.name: ThreeFrames
enum_values.description: Three frame beyond packing ratio available

fields.name: TSERF
fields.description: Additional number of SPI data to be transacted was reload

enum_values.name: NotLoaded
enum_values.description: Additional number of SPI data to be transacted not yet loaded

enum_values.name: Loaded
enum_values.description: Additional number of SPI data to be transacted was reloaded

enum_values.name: Completed
enum_values.description: Transmission buffer filled with at least one transfer

enum_values.name: Unavailable
enum_values.description: Duplex packet unavailable: no space for transmission and/or no data received

enum_values.name: Available
enum_values.description: Duplex packet available: space for transmission and data received

fields.name: TIFREC
fields.description: TI frame format error flag clear

registers.name: TXDR16
registers.description: Direct 16-bit access to transmit data register

registers.name: TXDR8
registers.description: Direct 8-bit access to transmit data register

registers.name: RXDR16
registers.description: Direct 16-bit access to receive data register

registers.name: RXDR8
registers.description: Direct 8-bit access to receive data register

enum_values.name: RightAligned
enum_values.description: The data inside RXDR and TXDR are right aligned

enum_values.name: LeftAligned
enum_values.description: The data inside RXDR and TXDR are left aligned

enum_values.name: NotFixed
enum_values.description: The channel length in slave mode is different from 16 or 32 bits (CHLEN not taken into account)

enum_values.name: Fixed
enum_values.description: The channel length in slave mode is supposed to be 16 or 32 bits (according to CHLEN)

enum_values.name: SampleOnRising
enum_values.description: Signals are sampled on rising and changed on falling clock edges

enum_values.name: SampleOnFalling
enum_values.description: Signals are sampled on falling and changed on rising clock edges

fields.name: CHLEN
fields.description: Channel length (number of bits per audio channel)
